items.name: Sharp Shark Sword
items.description: Do 15 to 35 damage per swing with this amazing Sharp Shark Sword (say that 10 times fast!)  Click and hold to do the special attack, which will unleash a tsunami, complete with hungry ,that you will ride for several seconds.  Anyone hit by the wave or sharks will take massive damage!

items.name: Tambourine
items.description:
Hey! Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me, /
I'm not sleepy and there is no place I'm going to. /
Hey! Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me, /
In the jingle jangle morning I'll come followin' you.

items.name: Annoying Elf: ReeseMcBlox
items.description: A jolly friend that gives you more speed,  but also gives your enemies more strength.

items.name: Chopper Broom
items.description: Hey bud, wanna race? Equip and click and drag to rev your engine and fly around in the direction of your cursor.

items.name: Inugami: Ninja Warrior
items.description: Ninja dogs stay hidden in the barkness. This faithful friend follows your every step, remaining in your shadow, waiting for the right moment to strike...

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Staff
items.description: Use the magical power of Emeralds to immobilize and shock your target!

items.name: Sharp Looking Hat - the Gear
items.description: It's not just sharp looking. It's actually sharp! Throw this hat at opponents to do damage with its razor sharp edges.  Don't worry about getting it back - it magically appears back on your head after it hits something.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Sword
items.description: Strike at your foes and in addition to doing damage you will push them to the ground.

items.name: Holiday Ornament Staff
items.description: Send a giant holiday ornament hurling at your enemies to squish them.

items.name: The Pharaoh Guard's Sword
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 14 to 17 damage. With each slash you'll unlock the ancient power of the Pharaoh's Guard and have a chance at preforming a secret attack or enjoying a hidden power up!

items.name: Exploding Arrow Crimson Crossbow
items.description: This crimson crossbow fires an arrow that sticks to the first thing it hits and explodes after about 2 seconds. The explosion deals between 10 and 110 damage based on how long the arrow was flying through the air.

items.name: Zombie Penguin Attack Horde
items.description: A horde of six zombie penguins! When an enemy is nearby, they'll slide on their bellies over to the enemy, then stand up with their wings out (in traditional zombie fashion) and attack the enemy!

items.name: Bejeweled Sword of Great Fury
items.description: Do you see red or blue?  This fierce sword lets you switch between Ruby and Sapphire attacks.  In Ruby mode you deal 40 damage per hit, but take 15 damage yourself. In Sapphire mode you do 15 damage per hit, but can strike at a great speed, and heal yourself with each hit you land.

items.name: Ultimate Slide Skateboard
items.description: Time to show off as the coolest kid on the block!

items.name: Walrus
items.description: I am the eggman.  They are the eggman.  I am the WALRUS!

items.name: The Arabian Nights
items.description: "Imagine a thousand thousand fireflies of every shape and color; Oh, that was Baghdad at night in those days."

items.name: Giant Magnet
items.description: People just seem drawn to me, maybe it's my natural magnetism! Click to pull enemies within 30 studs closer with this powerful magnet.

items.name: Killer Whale Launcher
items.description: These whales nuke you!  Shoot whales at your foes to do 10 damage per touch- ie instant KO.  To zoom, you roll your mouse wheel and use either 'Q' or 'Z'.

items.name: Dark Falchion
items.description: A trusty blade in all storms.

items.name: Hover Roped
items.description: The hover technology you have been promised is finally here! Ride around ROBLOX on your very own hover Roped.

items.name: 2019 Spinning Noisemaker
items.description: Ring the new year in with as much noise as possible.

items.name: Glorious Sword
items.description: A sword of unfathomable power, laid buried in the sands of time till now.

items.name: Dart Trap
items.description: This ancient dart trap will shoot poisonous darts at anyone who crosses its path.  Each dart does 45 damage points.

items.name: Winterfang: The Fateful
items.description: Across the frozen tundra Winterfang ran, tracking his master's scent over a hundred miles. He would never abandon a friend in their time of need. Simply equip this item and he will spawn in front of you- ready to ride.

items.name: Chimera
items.description: This chimera attacks on command – performing one of three attacks – shooting fireballs, shooting poison, or biting. It does some serious damage with 30-60 damage dealt per attack.

items.name: Bad Seed
items.description: This snapdragon snaps back! Click to drop and your plant will take a bite out of anyone close enough to stop and smell the roses.

items.name: Crimson Double Threat
items.description: Double your threat, double your fun!

items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: Ninja Kitteh
items.description: Tremble before its meow!

items.name: Knights of the Seventh Sanctum: Sword and Shield
items.description: With their duty to stabilize Robloxia, they care not for what is right nor for what is wrong, but for stability. They are dangerous beyond belief and their undead nature strikes fear into the hearts of their enemies

items.name: Orinthian Crossbow
items.description: Don’t get caught up in the crossfire.
